bits.premise: A string of brutal appearance insults turns out to all originate from the same two-person group chat — the comedian's parents.
A woman having both a master's degree and a DUI is framed as the ideal combination of respectability and fun.

lines.text: - Brothership, how we doing?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm not doing good, guys.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: People say, "Fucked up shit to me all the time," man.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Someone said, "I look divorced.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: "I'm 30, all right."
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Another person said, "I look like Will Smith
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "is my favorite rapper."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And then someone else said, "I look like a substitute
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that just got out of prison.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'm like, all right, that's three insults.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: There's two people in this group chat.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: This is why I never asked my parents for shit anyways,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: you know?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Like I'm going on a date, I'm trying to send a selfie,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: how do I look in this shirt?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: This is what they fucking say to me.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But I go on the date, and I'm getting fatter,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm trying to articulate that in my profiles, right?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: So like every photo I get like a little bit fatter,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and like the current one is like what I am now.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But I go on this date, the chick's looking at the phone,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: looking at me, and she's like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "You look like a Russian doll that ate
lines.label: setup

lines.text: all the other versions of yourself.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: And I'm like, are you in that fucking group chat
lines.label: setup

lines.text: with my parents?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: 'Cause like, that is just too fucking good.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: But I am seeing a chick right now, believe it or not.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I feel like I could really get the best
lines.label: setup

lines.text: of both worlds with her
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause she's got a master's degree and a DUI.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Guys, I've been Chase Alexander.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: That's my time.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Thank you so much.
lines.label: fluff
